queue.title: Auto-defunct via DNS probe in liveness checker
queue.description: (added ~s1695): NicePick went NXDOMAIN between s1614 and s1692 but wasn't caught until manual E session observation. The liveness checker in services.json probes HTTP status but doesn't distinguish DNS failure from HTTP errors. Adding DNS resolution as a pre-check would auto-flag NXDOMAIN platforms for defunct reclassification instead of waiting for manual discovery.

queue.title: Add hook timing wrapper for pre-session performance tracking
queue.description: (promoted R#302 from brainstorming ~s1701): maintain-audit flagged 02-periodic-checks.sh at 6029ms avg. R#300 parallelized the checks but there's no measurement harness to verify improvement or detect regression. Create a timing wrapper in hooks/lib/ that logs per-hook wall-clock ms to a hook-timing.log, letting A sessions track performance trends and auto-flag regressions above 3000ms threshold.

queue.title: Add variety-analyzer unit tests
queue.description: (added ~s1715): engagement-variety-analyzer.mjs has no dedicated test file. It handles edge cases (empty traces, mixed string/object platforms_engaged, single-session windows) that are worth testing directly rather than only through hook integration. Would also cover the concentration threshold logic and alert-file output.

queue.title: Add brainstorm cleanup regression test
queue.description: (promoted R#303 from brainstorming ~s1701): 44-brainstorm-cleanup.sh had two bugs (## Ideas section not matched, --- separator resetting section state) that went undetected for 40+ sessions. Create a test with a mock BRAINSTORMING.md containing items in both ## Ideas and ## Evolution Ideas sections, plus --- separators, to catch regressions in the retirement logic.

queue.title: Add human-review.json schema validation to A session pre-hook
queue.description: (promoted R#303 from brainstorming ~s1705): hr-a173-1 had a duplicate 'updated' key (lines 13 and 23) that went undetected for multiple audits. Add a JSON schema check or duplicate-key linter in the A session pre-hook using node -e with a custom parser that flags duplicate keys and malformed entries early.
